articles.title: King Charles reveals he paid £12.9m in tax for 2024-25
articles.description: The King becomes first monarch to publish their tax payments - with the figures putting him among the UK's top 100 taxpayers.

articles.title: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
articles.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla will continue to reside in Clarence House, Buckingham Palace says.

articles.title: UK braced for hottest June night after 36.7C high on warmest day of year
articles.description: Temperatures reach 36.7C in Merryfield, Somerset, the highest temperature so far this year and the hottest June day on record.

articles.title: France warns even young people's health at risk as Europe's heatwave shifts east
articles.description: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
